description_long: This bungalow features a single-story log construction with a prominent gable roof and wide overhangs, evoking a rustic yet refined aesthetic. The exterior walls are composed of horizontal wooden logs, complemented by a stone foundation that adds both visual and structural solidity. A covered front porch with timber posts extends from the main entrance, providing a welcoming outdoor space. Large windows are distributed along the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a paved walkway leading to the entrance, as well as a small patio area with outdoor seating. The roof is finished in dark shingles, contrasting with the lighter wood tones of the walls and porch.
description: A single-story log bungalow with a gable roof, stone foundation, covered porch, and large windows, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the covered porch, main entrance, and the gable roof extending over the entryway.
description_view_1: This side angle shows the porch in detail, the patio area with outdoor seating, and the intersecting walkways.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the long side of the bungalow, the stone foundation, and the fenced boundary along the property.
description_view_3: The back corner view displays the rear porch area, the log wall construction, and the continuation of the fence.
